_comment: Boot straight INTO Pokemon Gold, fullscreen, with a FOURTH-WALL exit instrumented: the host polls work-RAM 0xDA22 (wPartyCount in US Gold/Silver — zero until the game commits your starter) after each stepped frame and requests a clean shutdown the moment it goes nonzero. The one-plane scene is never visible (the brick pane covers the whole frame); it exists because a world document requires a scene. The battery save persists to <romPath>.sav as usual, so the run you exited resumes where you saved.

source.romPath: D:/Source/ByteTerrace/Silo/ROMS/Pokemon - Gold Version (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible).gbc
